auth.enterOtp: Enter the 6-digit OTP sent to your phone
auth.signupSuccess: Account created successfully! Please log in.
auth.signupSubtitle: Join Sartaj Foods today to place orders and track delivery
auth.loginSubtitle: Enter your email or phone number to receive a login code
auth.agreeDisclaimer: By accessing Sartaj Foods systems, you agree to our <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.
auth.emailOrPhoneRequired: Please enter your email or phone number
auth.invalidEmailOrPhone: Please enter a valid email address or phone number in format +81XXXXXXXXX
auth.nameMinLength: Name must be at least 2 characters
auth.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
auth.invalidPhone: Please enter a valid Japan mobile number in format +81XXXXXXXXX
auth.invalidPostalCode: Postal code must be in format XXX-XXXX
auth.failedToSendOtpTryAgain: Failed to send OTP. Please try again.
auth.failedToResendOtpTryAgain: Failed to resend OTP. Please try again.
auth.otpExpired: OTP has expired. Please request a new one.
auth.customerExists: An account with this email or mobile number already exists.
auth.heroDescription: Experience the finest selection of quality ingredients, specialty foods, and authentic tastes tailored for culinary excellence.

home.title: Taste the Real Origin in Japan
home.subtitle: Premium basmati rice, aromatic spices, and traditional sweets imported directly for an uncompromising culinary experience.
home.trustedByProfessionalsDesc: At Sartaj Foods, we focus on providing competitive prices, superior ingredients, and exceptional service every day. Sourcing directly to ensure authenticity.
home.bestPricesDesc: At Sartaj Foods, we work hard to give our valued customers the greatest deals and discounts to ensure exceptional value.
home.wideAssortmentDesc: A wide range of spices, lentils, rice, snacks, ready-to-eat meals, and cosmetics sourced from trusted suppliers.
home.freeDeliveryDesc: We're delighted to offer free delivery services for orders worth ¥6500 or more (excluding some remote regions).
home.bestQualityDesc: Finest ingredients directly from trusted suppliers, carefully selected and rigorously inspected to meet high standards.
home.directImportSubtitle: Handpicked ingredients sourced directly from India to bring authentic taste to your table.
home.sweetsSubtitle: Celebrate with premium quality Gulab Jamun, Rasgulla, and handmade traditional treats for every occasion.
home.wellnessSubtitle: Boost your health and immunity with authentic organic teas, herbal supplements, and Ayurvedic ingredients.
home.promoBannerTitle: Bringing <highlight>Authentic Indian Flavours</highlight> to Every Home.

checkout.chooseFreeGiftDesc: Select one free gift to include with your order.

orders.cancelOrderPromptDesc: You can cancel this order within 1 hour of placing it. The cancellation period will expire soon.
orders.cancelReasonPlaceholder: Write your cancellation reason here (minimum 10 characters)...
orders.cancelReasonHelp: Please let us know the reason for cancelling this order. This helps us improve our services.
orders.reorderProceed:
You are adding {count} items from a previous order to your cart.

• New items will be added to your current selection.
• Existing items in your cart will have their quantities updated to match this order.

Note: Out-of-stock products will be skipped automatically.

Would you like to proceed?

footer.description: Authentic South Asian flavors imported directly to Japan. Experience premium Basmati rice, aromatic spices, and traditional sweets.
footer.hoursValue: Monday to Saturday from 09:00AM-18:00PM (except national holiday)
